title: Looking for a Monday expert to set up our workflow processes, automations & integrations
excerpt:
Hey, 
We’re an events & branding company. 
We’re looking to properly set up our Monday account to meet our workflow requirements. 
I don’t think it’s too difficult, but what might take us days, could take an expert just …

posts.author: ricklees (Rick Lees)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

We’re an events & branding company.

We’re looking to properly set up our Monday account to meet our workflow requirements.

I don’t think it’s too difficult, but what might take us days, could take an expert just a few minutes…

So it’d be great to speak to a few people to get an idea of cost & timescale.

Are there any Monday experts that might want to open an discussion?

Thanks

Rick

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @ricklees

upstream can help. We are Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners and APAC Partner of the Year for 2020. Based in Australia, we have a global staff network encompassing dedicated teams.

You’ll have access to our Solutions Engineers as well as our full stack Development Team who specialise in integrations and custom requirements.

Please feel free to contact me directly via peta@upstreamtech.io alternatively you can book straight into my calendar for a meeting using the below link. I am currently working with a client in the events industry and have just finished a project with another so would be very interested to understand your use case and see how we can help you.

Meet with Peta

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream

posts.author: Andrew1 (Andrew)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Rick,
All that you have described is certainly well within my area of expertise and I would be glad to help you out on all this.
You can reach me on andrewjohnson56782@gmail.com
Best Wishes,
Andrew

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @ricklees and thanks for reaching out to the monday.com community forums.

It is always nice to connect with someone who is new to monday and looking to create their perfect environment. The team at CarbonWeb actually has produced an out-of-the-box solution that will allow you to take monday.com to the next level for you and your team with minimal effort from your end.

If you’d like to hear more about this product or learn about our component-by-component style I would be happy to have a meeting. You can always schedule with me here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you get started!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: KayaW (Kaya Wong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ricklees!

Welcome to the community! You are in the right place to find someone.

My name is Kaya from Kick Consulting. We are a Silver Partner with monday.com and have a global team of 14 (project/change managers, implementation specialists, developers) who have a tremendous amount of monday.com knowledge. We would love to help you set up and optimise your monday!

We offer a complimentary 30-minute initial meeting to discuss your pain points, needs, possible steps forward and options. You can book through this link. If you cannot find a suitable time, please let me know, and I will contact you with more availability.

I look forward to hearing from you.

Kaya
Kick Consulting
